# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Currently, we support the latest major version of Redolarium for security updates. 

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 1.0.x   | :white_check_mark: |
| < 1.0   | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability within Redolarium, please do NOT open a public issue. Instead, send an email to the repository owners or use GitHub's private vulnerability reporting feature if enabled for this repository.

We consider security issues to be critical and will respond as soon as possible. Please allow time for the maintainers to review, confirm, and patch the issue before disclosing it publicly.
